title: rubus harpactor
intro: Rubus harpactor, also known as Himalayan blackberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus harpactor include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help manage diabetes. Herbal preparations of Rubus harpactor include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations and wounds.
